title: fix bug in podman images list all images with same name
body:
fix #2241 
`podman images [image name]` can list all images with different tags has the given image name.
In order to match docker, passing the argument to podman images has the same result as using `podman images --filter reference=[argument]`
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: one nit and the tests don't look happy at all.  I don't think they're unhappy due to this change, but might be wrong.
@TomSweeneyRedHat can't see your review, forget to post them? yes..the tests fail -_- :broken_heart:
Needs approved label to run tide. :thinking:
